task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the OSCAR EMR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR main dashboard or schedule screen is visible, indicating a successful login (likely showing 'oscardoc' as the logged-in user).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the basic provider details for Emily Watson.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A provider creation or edit form shows 'Emily' in the first name field, 'Watson' in the last name field, '100123' in the provider number field, 'doctor' as the type, and 'Family Medicine' as the specialty.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct contact and status information for the provider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The provider form shows 'Female' (or 'F') selected for Sex, '416-555-0199' in the work phone field, and 'Active' (or '1') selected for Status.

task_completion.description: Verify the provider record was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message, a confirmation screen, or the provider 'Emily Watson' (100123) appearing in the system's provider search list or directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct security login details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A security/login creation form shows the username 'ewatson', a password entered (may be masked as dots/asterisks), and the PIN '2234'.

task_completion.description: Verify the security record is linked to the provider and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The security record screen shows a link or association to provider '100123' or 'Emily Watson', followed by a save confirmation or the user appearing in the security/user list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OSCAR EMR web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the OSCAR EMR UI. There should be no terminal windows executing SQL commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered data into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The target data (names, numbers, credentials) should be visible inside the input fields of the OSCAR EMR web application, not in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application using database management tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of phpMyAdmin, MySQL CLI, or other direct database manipulation tools being used to insert the records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a provider in OSCAR EMR. Verified values to look for: Provider Number '100123', First Name 'Emily', Last Name 'Watson', Type 'doctor', Specialty 'Family Medicine', Sex 'F' (or Female), Phone '416-555-0199', Status '1' (or Active). The linked security record must have Username 'ewatson' and PIN '2234' (Password 'Watson2024!' may be masked). The agent should log in initially using 'oscardoc' / 'oscar' / PIN '1117'.
